caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him, which seem to capture various moments and people. To his right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and green pants, and further back, racks of clothing suggest that the space might also serve as a retail store. The man is engaged in conversation, smiling and looking slightly to his left, indicating an interactive and friendly atmosphere.
